elements.description: Bare LED-tube-style wall/ceiling bracket fixture mounted at the top wall of ซักล้าง (laundry), controlled by switch 'j' immediately below it
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'i' and 'i', vertically aligned through ห้องครัว (kitchen), wired down to a switch labeled 'i' at the kitchen doorway

Two downlights (⊕) side by side near the top wall of ห้องนอน 2, connected by a wire; labels are faint -- left one shows a small unclear subscript mark, right one reads clearly as a letter distinct from the lower-row 'k' pair (possibly a repeat of a nearby letter or a wiring-diagram artifact, not confidently transcribed)
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'k' and 'k', mid-room, wired to a two-gang switch labeled 'k,l' at the doorway
Two downlights (⊕) near the top wall of ห้องนอน 1, both labeled 'n' (left one has a faint small mark next to the letter, likely a drafting artifact rather than a distinct label)
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'm' and 'm', mid-room, wired to a three-gang switch labeled 'm,n,o' at the doorway shared with the adjoining bathroom (o = that bathroom's downlights)
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'h' and 'h', wired to a switch labeled 'h' at the doorway

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'b' and 'b' near the top of ทานอาหาร (dining), and two more downlights labeled 'a' and 'a' lower in the same room; circuit tag '1/LP' feeds into the 'a' pair directly from the LP panel; a two-gang switch labeled 'a,b' sits at the room's door threshold

Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'f' and 'f' near the top wall of พักผ่อน, plus one downlight labeled 'c' lower in the room; switch 'f' is at the wall shared with ห้องนอน 3 (co-located with the 'B' door-chime unit), and a 'c,d,e' three-gang switch is at the room's exterior corner
Boxed 'B' symbol (door chime/กริ่ง unit) mounted on the wall between พักผ่อน and ห้องนอน 3, wired on the same run as switch 'f'

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'g' and 'g' (one near the doorway, one mid-room), wired to switch 'g' at the doorway shared with พักผ่อน
Bare LED-tube-style wall bracket fixture labeled 'd' mounted under the roof eave at เฉลียง (porch), on the 'c,d,e' switch circuit
Bare LED-tube-style wall bracket fixture labeled 'e' mounted at จอดรถ (carport), on the 'c,d,e' switch circuit
แผงเมนสวิตช์ (LP) mounted on the wall at the ทานอาหาร/จอดรถ boundary corner, feeding circuit '1/LP' into the dining-room 'a' downlight pair

Incoming service run shown at the bottom of the sheet: หลักดินแท่งเหล็กทองแดงบอนด์ (ground rod, ø14.2mm, ยาว 2.40m), 1-10 IEC 01-20mm.PVC ground conductor to the LP panel, and a 2-2.5 NYY-ø25mm.PVC run down through จอดรถ to a weatherproof bell switch (SB) at the bottom edge of the plan, matching the same run described in more detail on EE-04

A small unlabeled hollow square symbol between the two ห้องน้ำ rooms, roughly on the building centerline near row D -- not connected to any wiring line and not matching any entry in the EE-01 symbol legend; likely a non-electrical architectural symbol (e.g. floor drain or ceiling access hatch shown for reference) rather than a lighting element. Excluded from the lighting element count.

warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION: the printed dimension chain on this page (3.20+3.20+3.20=9.60 horizontal under grid 1/2/3/4; 4.00+2.00+3.60+1.80+3.15=14.55 vertical below grid F..A) matches the building grid master (บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly. No dummy/prime grid lines observed on this sheet.

This sheet is a symbol-routing plan, not a quantity/fixture-count schedule -- letter-to-switch-loop correspondence was traced visually via multiple zoomed crops of the source image and is believed accurate for the labeled points, but two spots remain genuinely ambiguous: (1) the top-row downlight pair in ห้องนอน 2 has a faint/unclear left-hand label, and (2) the top-row downlight pair in ห้องนอน 1 ('n','n') both carry a small extra mark next to the left letter that could not be confidently resolved as a distinct character vs. a drafting artifact.
Fixture types (downlight vs LED tube spec) are defined on the EE-01 symbol legend, not repeated here.

The boxed 'B' door-chime symbol is not explicitly named in the EE-01 symbol legend by that exact label, but its glyph (small box with a bell/wedge shape on top) most closely matches the legend's 'bell icon' entry (กริ่ง 2 เสียง); flagged for human confirmation rather than asserted with full confidence.

Total downlight count summed from this element list is approximately 24 (2 kitchen + 2+2 bedroom2 + 2+2 bedroom1 + 2+2 bathrooms + 4 dining + 3 living + 2 bedroom3) plus 3 wall-bracket LED tube fixtures (laundry, porch, carport) -- this is a best-effort tally from the drawing, not a verified bill-of-quantities figure.
